Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Equivalence between subobjects and codomains

 We construct a displayed equivalence between the displayed category of monomorphisms
 and of subobjects of partial setoids, as defined in `SubobjectDispCat.v`. This allows us
 to reason about the internal logic of partial setoids using the notion of subobject that
 we defined in `SubobjectDispCat`. This simplifies reasoning in the internal logic.

 In essence, the construction in this file is a more complicated but more general version
 of the construction in `PERMonomorphisms.v`. We reuse several lemmas from that file about
 monomorphisms.

 Content
 1. Subobjects to monomorphisms
 2. The action on morphisms
 3. The displayed functor
 4. Fully faithfulness
 5. Split essential surjectivity

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.MonoCodomain.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.MonoCodomain.FiberMonoCod.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMonomorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.Logic.SubobjectDispCat.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

Section MonoSubobjectEquiv.
  Context (H : first_order_hyperdoctrine).

  (** * 1. Subobjects to monomorphisms *)
  Section SubobjectToMono.
    Context {X : partial_setoid H}
            (φ : per_subobject X).

    Let χ : form (X ×h X)
      := let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
         let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
         x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [ x₁ ].

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
per_axioms χ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
per_axioms χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
per_axioms
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
per_trans_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
     ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  ∧ φ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))]

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~

∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
     ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
       ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),

φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃ ∧ φ [x₂] ⊢ φ [x₁]

φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ φ [x₁]

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X

φ [x₁] ⊢ φ [x₁]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
Γ: ty H
x, y: tm Γ subobject_to_partial_setoid
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ (x : tm Γ X) ~ y
q: Δ ⊢ φ [x]
Δ ⊢ x ~ y

φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))),
   π₂
     (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))
   ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))) ~
    π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X)))

X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))),
   π₂
     (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))
   ⟩]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (tm_var
          ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (tm_var
          ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X)))

(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))
 ⟩]

    (π₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)

x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁

χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
    ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
       ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
       ⟩]
      ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X

let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid))])
 [π₁
    (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))])
[π₁
   (tm_var
      (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid)
                  ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X)
            ×h X))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
     ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid)
                    ×h X) ×h X)))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X)
           ×h X)) ⟩]
    ⇒ π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid)
                ×h X) ×h X))) ~
      π₂
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X)
            ×h X))

   [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm])

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),

      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]

  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))

χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
(π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
 ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
  ∧ φ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid))
  ⇒ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
         ∧ φ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
        [⟨ (π₂
              (tm_var
                 (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid)))
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid)
                  ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂
           (tm_var
              ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid) ×h X))
         ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
x ~ x
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h X), x ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ φ
    [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
      [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h X), x ⟩ ]tm ]tm]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
x ~ x ⊢ x ~ x ∧ φ [x]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in

W: partial_setoid H

  subobject_to_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =

  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl

x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
ψ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (ψ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ χ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ w, x ⟩]

X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in

  subobject_to_partial_setoid

x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
ψ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (ψ₁
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ χ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W
  subobject_to_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
ψ₁ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ (ψ₁
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ χ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), ?t ⟩]

  subobject_to_partial_setoid

  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =

      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]

  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
ψ₂ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

     subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl) [⟨ w, x ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)

  subobject_to_partial_setoid

  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =

  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
ψ₂ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (ψ₂
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ χ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),

∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W
  subobject_to_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ψ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]

⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

φ: per_subobject X

⊢ ?y₁ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))

 exact w.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)

  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl

⊢ x₂ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: per_subobject X

  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ x₂, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₂ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)

  subobject_to_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ψ₁ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ x₂, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
χ:= let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [x₁]: form (X ×h X)
W: partial_setoid H
ψ₁, ψ₂: partial_setoid_morphism W
  subobject_to_partial_setoid
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₁
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ψ₂
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ψ₁ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.
  End SubobjectToMono.

  (** * 2. The action on morphisms *)
  Section SubobjectMorToMono.
    Context {X Y : partial_setoid H}
            (ψ₁ : per_subobject X)
            (ψ₂ : per_subobject Y)
            (φ : partial_setoid_morphism X Y)
            (p : per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂).

    Let ξ : form (X ×h Y)
      := let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
         let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
         φ [ ⟨ x , y ⟩ ] ∧ ψ₁ [ x ] ∧ ψ₂ [ y ].

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ξ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ξ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_eq_defined_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])

φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁))])
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ~
    π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))

X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁))])
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (tm_var
          ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (tm_var
          ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))),
 π₂
   (tm_var
      ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (tm_var
          ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (tm_var
          ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y] ⊢ x ~ x

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]
⊢ (x : tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X) ~ x

X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y] ⊢ ψ₁ [x]

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y] ⊢ ψ₁ [x]

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))

            ((((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
               ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))))
 ∧ π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ~
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((𝟙
                       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                            ψ₁)
                      ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                           ψ₁)
                     ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
                    ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((𝟙
                    ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                  ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))]
    ∧ ψ₂
      [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))]
    ∧ ψ₂
      [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(π₂
   (π₁

 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~

  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁

   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁

    ∧ ψ₂
      [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]

    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))]
    ∧ ψ₂
      [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁
    [π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁]
⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₂] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ ?x₁ ~ x₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁]
⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
 exact x₁.

∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ ψ₁ [x₂]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ ?x ~ x₂

X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₁ ~ y₂ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₁ ~ y₂ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂)
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₁]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₁]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
((⊤
  [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁))])
 [π₁
    (tm_var
       ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
        ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))])
[π₁
   (tm_var
      (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
        ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                  ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (φ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
       ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((𝟙
                     ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                    ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
                   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))),
     π₂
       (tm_var
          (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
    ⇒ π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
               ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ~
      π₂
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
((⊤
  [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁))])
 [π₁
    (tm_var
       ((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
        ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))])
[π₁
   (tm_var
      (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
        ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                  ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                  ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ~
    π₂
      (tm_var
         (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
               ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))),
 π₂
   (π₁
      (tm_var
         (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                  ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ~
    π₂
      (tm_var
         (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

(φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁

              (((𝟙 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
                ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)

   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁

    (π₁
       (tm_var

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁])
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁])
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]
⊢ (y₁ : tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y) ~ y₂

(φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁])
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₁]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁])
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x, y₁ ⟩]

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁])
∧ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₁]

ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₁]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
ψ₂ [y₁] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₁]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
  ⇒ ∃h ((φ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
          ⟩]
         ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
           ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
         ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
         ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ ?Goal ~ ?Goal
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ?Goal [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
         ⟩]
        ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
          ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
         ⟩]
        ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
          ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
         [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
             [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
         ]tm]
        ∧ ψ₂
          [(π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
           [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
            [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
               [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
           ]tm])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))])

ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))])

ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~

      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ₁
        [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y

            exact y.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))]
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))), y ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))] ∧ ψ₂ [y]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x ~ x ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]

x ~ x ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x ~ x ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [x]

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x ~ x ⊢ ψ₁ [x]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
