  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
 exact ξ.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ξ
 exact subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor_laws.
    Defined.

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
    (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(∃h (subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))),
      π₂
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
     ∧ (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
                ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)))
        ⟩]))
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))]
∧ subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
  ∧ (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var
            ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ)
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
[⟨ π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))),
 π₂
   (tm_var
      ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)) ⟩]
∧ (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)
  [⟨ π₂
       (tm_var
          ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
           ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))) ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ)
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
        ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
 ∧ ψ₁
   [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ₂
     [(π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ₂
    [(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
          ]tm])
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))])
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
       ∧ ψ₁
         [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))))])
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))))
         ⟩])

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) X
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))]
   ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))])
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))
       ∧ ψ₁
         [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))))])
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))))
         ⟩])

    ∧ ψ₁
      [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))))])

X, Y: partial_setoid H

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]
⊢ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~ x
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))])
  ∧ φ [⟨ x, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]
⊢ (x ~ x ∧ ψ₁ [x]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]
⊢ x ~ x

⊢ ψ₁ [x]

 exact x.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]) ∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂]
⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
    (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(∃h ((subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁)
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
                 ×h X))),
      π₂
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X))
      ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
                ×h X)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
                 ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁)
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
              ×h X))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X))
   ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var
            ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
             ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y)
              ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂))
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁)
[⟨ π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂
   (tm_var
      ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (tm_var
          ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X)))
   ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂))
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁ ×h Y) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
         ⟩]
        ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))]
          ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
          ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ₁
   [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩
        [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
          [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
          ]tm]
         ∧ ψ₂
           [(π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
            [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
             [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
                [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
            ]tm])
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ ψ₂
          [(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
            [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
           ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
 ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ₁
         [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))]
         ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))])
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))])

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

         [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))]
         ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))])
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))])

    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),

      [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))]

     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y

          exact y.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ₁
      [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))]
      ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))])
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ₁
     [(π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
      [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ ψ₂
       [(π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩ ]tm])
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩]
    ∧ ψ₂
      [(π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
       [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩ ]tm]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))), y ⟩]
   ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))] ∧ ψ₂ [y])
  ∧ y ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ∧ ψ₂ [y]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ∧ ψ₂ [y]) ∧ y ~ y ∧ ψ₂ [y]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y ⟩]

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
 exact x₂.

φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [x₁]

φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x, y ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [?x]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
 exact x₂.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁]) ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ₁ [x₂]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y

x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ⊢ ψ₁ [x₂]

tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ₁ [x₁] ⊢ ψ₁ [x₁]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_mor_law φ ψ₁ ψ₂
ξ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ∧ ψ₂ [y]: form (X ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X) X
ψ₁ [x₁] ⊢ ψ₁ [x₁]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.
  End SubobjectMorToMono.

  (** * 3. The displayed functor *)
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_data
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
  (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
  (disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H))

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_data
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
  (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
  (disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H))

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ x : category_of_partial_setoids H,
disp_cat_per_subobject H x
→ disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
    (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
       x)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
(λ Fob : ∏ x : category_of_partial_setoids H,
         disp_cat_per_subobject H x
         → disp_mono_codomain
             (category_of_partial_setoids H)
             (functor_identity
                (category_of_partial_setoids H) x),
 ∏ (x y : category_of_partial_setoids H)
 (xx : disp_cat_per_subobject H x)
 (yy : disp_cat_per_subobject H y)
 (f : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   # (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
     f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ x : category_of_partial_setoids H,
disp_cat_per_subobject H x
→ disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
    (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
       x)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
φ: per_subobject X
FullSubcategory.disp_full_sub
  (Total.total_category
     (Codomain.disp_codomain
        (category_of_partial_setoids H)))
  (λ f : Total.total_category
           (Codomain.disp_codomain
              (category_of_partial_setoids H)),
   isMonic (pr22 f))
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H) X,,
   subobject_to_partial_setoid φ,,
   subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)

      apply isMonic_subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
(λ Fob : ∏ x : category_of_partial_setoids H,
         disp_cat_per_subobject H x
         → disp_mono_codomain
             (category_of_partial_setoids H)
             (functor_identity
                (category_of_partial_setoids H) x),
 ∏ (x y : category_of_partial_setoids H)
 (xx : disp_cat_per_subobject H x)
 (yy : disp_cat_per_subobject H y)
 (f : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   # (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
     f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (X : partial_setoid H) (φ : per_subobject X),
   (subobject_to_partial_setoid φ,,
    subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl φ),,
   isMonic_subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl φ)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: disp_cat_per_subobject H X
ψ₂: disp_cat_per_subobject H Y
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
p: ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂
((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁,,
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁),,
 isMonic_subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) -->[
# (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] 
((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂,,
  subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂),,
 isMonic_subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
ψ₁: disp_cat_per_subobject H X
ψ₂: disp_cat_per_subobject H Y
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
p: ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂
subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor ψ₁ ψ₂ φ p
· pr21 ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂,,
         subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂),,
        isMonic_subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
pr21 ((subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁,,
       subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁),,
      isMonic_subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁)
· # (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
    φ

      apply subobject_to_partial_setoid_mor_eq.
  Defined.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
  (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
  (disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H))

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
  (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
  (disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H))

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_data
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
  (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
  (disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (functor_identity
             (category_of_partial_setoids H))
          (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
          (disp_mono_codomain
             (category_of_partial_setoids H)),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_data
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
  (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
  (disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H))
 exact per_subobject_disp_functor_data.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (functor_identity
             (category_of_partial_setoids H))
          (disp_cat_per_subobject H)
          (disp_mono_codomain
             (category_of_partial_setoids H)),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  per_subobject_disp_functor_data
 abstract
        (split ; intro ; intros ; apply locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat).
  Defined.

  (** * 4. Fully faithfulness *)
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_ff per_subobject_disp_functor

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_ff per_subobject_disp_functor

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
isweq
  (λ ff : ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂,
   (♯ per_subobject_disp_functor)%mor_disp ff)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
# (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] 
per_subobject_disp_functor Y ψ₂ → ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
isaprop (ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
isaprop
  (per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
   # (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
     φ] per_subobject_disp_functor Y ψ₂)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
# (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] 
per_subobject_disp_functor Y ψ₂ → ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
# (functor_identity
     (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] per_subobject_disp_functor
                                           Y ψ₂
ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
# (functor_identity
     (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] per_subobject_disp_functor
                                           Y ψ₂
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
    ⇒ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
# (functor_identity
     (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] per_subobject_disp_functor
                                           Y ψ₂
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
  ⇒ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
# (functor_identity
     (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] per_subobject_disp_functor
                                           Y ψ₂
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
  ⇒ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
p: per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
# (functor_identity
     (category_of_partial_setoids H)) φ] per_subobject_disp_functor
                                           Y ψ₂
φ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ ψ₁ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

unit

X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y

χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ)
  [⟨ ?t₁, ?t₂ ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
   (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂))
[⟨ ?t₁, ?t₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ₂ [y]

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
 exact x.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ)
  [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
        ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ x, y ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ ∃h (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
        ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X

X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
     ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

ψ₂: per_subobject Y

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X

          exact x.

X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
     ∧ ψ₁ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
   [⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
   ∧ ψ₁
     [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
        [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩ ]tm ]tm ]tm])
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
      [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y), x ⟩ ]tm ]tm]

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x]
⊢ (x ~ x ∧ ψ₁ [x]) ∧ φ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ₁ [x] ⊢ x ~ x

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
   (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂)) [⟨ x, y ⟩]
⊢ ψ₂ [y]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(∃h (χ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ₂ [y]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
(∃h (χ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
∃h ((χ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
        ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
    [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
(∃h ((χ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
         ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
∧ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
      ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
(χ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))
    ∧ ψ₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y))])
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
[⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
χ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
 [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ₂
    [(π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
⊢ ψ₂
  [(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ₂ [π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ ψ₂ [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))), y₂ ⟩]
∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₁]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))), y₂ ⟩]
∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ ?x ~ y₁
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))), y₂ ⟩]
∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ ψ₂ [?x]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
 exact y₂.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ

y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))), y₂ ⟩]
∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₁
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₁

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂ ~ y₁ ⊢ y₂ ~ y₁

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))), y₂ ⟩]
∧ y₂ ~ y₁ ∧ ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₂]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₁)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid ψ₂)
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₂) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl ψ₁) φ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
ψ₂ [y₂] ⊢ ψ₂ [y₂]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
isaprop (ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
isProofIrrelevant (ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂)

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x, y: ψ₁ -->[ φ] ψ₂
x = y

      apply disp_mor_eq_hyperdoctrine.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
ψ₁: per_subobject X
ψ₂: per_subobject Y
φ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
isaprop
  (per_subobject_disp_functor X ψ₁ -->[
   # (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H))
     φ] per_subobject_disp_functor Y ψ₂)
 apply locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat.
  Qed.

  (** * 5. Split essential surjectivity *)
  Section Eso.
    Context {X Y : partial_setoid H}
            (φ : partial_setoid_morphism Y X)
            (Hφ : isMonic (C := category_of_partial_setoids H) φ).

    Let ζ : form X
      := let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
         let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
         (∃h (φ [ ⟨ y , x ⟩ ])).

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_laws ζ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_laws ζ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_laws
  (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_def_law
  (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_eq_law
  (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_def_law
  (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
  ⇒ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_eq_law
  (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
  ⇒ (∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
          ⟩])) [π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))]
    ⇒ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)),
            π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
      [π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))]

ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
    π₂
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ y, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]

tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H

tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
 exact y.

φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject X

per_subobject X

form X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_laws ?φ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
form X
 exact ζ.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
per_subobject_laws ζ
 exact monic_to_per_subobject_laws.
    Defined.

    Let ξ₁ : form (subobject_to_partial_setoid monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
      := let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
         let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
         φ [ ⟨ y , x ⟩ ].

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ξ₁

  (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(⊤
 [π₁
    (tm_var
       (𝟙
        ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
             monic_to_per_subobject))])
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((𝟙
        ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
             monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((𝟙
               ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                    monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((𝟙
          ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
               monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((𝟙
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                   monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((𝟙
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                   monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y)))

    (π₁

          ((𝟙
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                 monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (tm_var
          ((𝟙

                 monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y)))

              monic_to_per_subobject) ×h Y))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
    ⇒ (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       ⟩]
      ⇒ (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))])

[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))

  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
  ⇒ (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
    ⇒ (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
