x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
   ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂) ∧ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₂, x₂ ⟩]

⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
 exact y₁.

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

 apply monic_to_per_subobject.

x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ y₁ ~ y₂) ∧ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
∧ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]

  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))),

  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),

  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))) ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩] ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₁, ?y ⟩]

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₂, ?y ⟩]

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y₁, x ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩]

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₂, x ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  (φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
  ⇒ ∃h ((φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ ζ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ (∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
         ⟩])) [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
[⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
∃h (φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩])

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

  monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ =

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     monic_to_per_subobject)
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
       monic_to_per_subobject)
    (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

    monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
       monic_to_per_subobject)
    (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(∃h (monic_to_per_subobject_mor
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                    monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
               monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                   monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                    monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y)))
        ⟩]))
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
          monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ monic_to_per_subobject_mor
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                 monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
            monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var
            ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                 monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y)))
     ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
        monic_to_per_subobject)
     (id_partial_setoid_morphism X))
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
            monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₁
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
        ∧ ζ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
        ∧ ζ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]

       ∧ ζ
         [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))))])
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))

    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
    ∧ (∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)),
            π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
      [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))))])
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y), x₁ ⟩]

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y

    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))
   [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y), x₁ ⟩]
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))
          ⟩
          [⟨ ((π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
              [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y), x₁ ⟩ ]tm)
             [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
    [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y), x₁ ⟩]

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

⊢ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))) ~ x₁
   ∧ ∃h (φ

          π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     monic_to_per_subobject)
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(∃h ((subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
        monic_to_per_subobject)
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                    monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X))),
      π₂
        (tm_var
           ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
               monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                   monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                    monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X)))
        ⟩]))
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
          monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     monic_to_per_subobject)
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                 monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
            monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var
            ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
                 monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X)))
     ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ)
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((subobject_to_partial_setoid
            monic_to_per_subobject ×h X) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ ζ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (ξ₁
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h X))]

 ∧ ∃h (φ

      ∧ φ

         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))
 ∧ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
   π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (ξ₁
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
         ⟩])

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ

(x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₃) ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]
⊢ (ξ₁
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
      ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X

tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
 exact y.

   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₃) ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]
⊢ ((φ [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)),
      π₂
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
      ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₃) ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ y, π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ y, π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⟩]

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₃ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₃
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₃ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₃

                   apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

                   apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
            
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₃ ~ x₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₃) ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]

               apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

    Let ξ₂ : form (Y ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid monic_to_per_subobject)
      := let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
         let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
         φ [ ⟨ y , x ⟩ ].

        monic_to_per_subobject)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)))

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)

φ [⟨ y, x ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)),
    x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X), y ⟩]

φ [⟨ y, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
    ⇒ (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))
       ⟩]
      ⇒ (φ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
(y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₂, x₂ ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y

Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form

y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
(y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
 exact y₁.

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
(y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
per_subobject X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
y₂:= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
(y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y₁, x₁ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)

  (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ (φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (φ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]
⊢ (x₁ : tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X) ~ x₂

⊢ monic_to_per_subobject [x₁]

tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y

 exact y.

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]

φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]
⊢ monic_to_per_subobject [x₁]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)), π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [x₁]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
       x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ]tm ⟩])

        monic_to_per_subobject)

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
    x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
    ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y))
  ⇒ ∃h ((φ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩])

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) X
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) X
y ~ y ∧ φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ

    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)

x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) X
y ~ y ∧ φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))), x ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) X
y ~ y ∧ φ [⟨ y, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in

  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Y) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  monic_to_per_subobject_inv
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     monic_to_per_subobject) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  monic_to_per_subobject_inv

     monic_to_per_subobject) =

  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  monic_to_per_subobject_inv

     monic_to_per_subobject)
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
    (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X

let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  monic_to_per_subobject_inv

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
(∃h (monic_to_per_subobject_inv
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((Y ×h X)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                      monic_to_per_subobject))),
      π₂
        (tm_var
           ((Y ×h X)
            ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                 monic_to_per_subobject)) ⟩]
     ∧ (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
          monic_to_per_subobject)
       [⟨ π₂
            (tm_var
               ((Y ×h X)
                ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                     monic_to_per_subobject)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((Y ×h X)
                 ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                      monic_to_per_subobject))) ⟩]))
[π₁
   (tm_var
      ((Y ×h X)
       ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
            monic_to_per_subobject))]
∧ monic_to_per_subobject_inv
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((Y ×h X)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                   monic_to_per_subobject))),
   π₂
     (tm_var
        ((Y ×h X)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
              monic_to_per_subobject)) ⟩]
  ∧ (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
       monic_to_per_subobject)
    [⟨ π₂
         (tm_var
            ((Y ×h X)
             ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                  monic_to_per_subobject)),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((Y ×h X)
              ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
                   monic_to_per_subobject))) ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
     (id_partial_setoid_morphism X))
  [π₁
     (tm_var
        ((Y ×h X)
         ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
              monic_to_per_subobject))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
(φ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ζ [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
φ
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ ζ
    [(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

        monic_to_per_subobject)

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ∧ ζ [x₂]
⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩] ∧ x₁ ~ x₁

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ∧ ζ [x₂] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]

        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ∧ ζ [x₂] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂ ~ x₁ ∧ ζ [x₂] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁

          exact (partial_setoid_refl_r (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    monic_to_per_subobject_inv
    (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
       monic_to_per_subobject)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism
     monic_to_per_subobject_inv
     (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
        monic_to_per_subobject))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X))
         ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
          ∧ (∃h (φ
                 [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)),
                  π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩]))
            [π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X))])
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ ∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)),
               π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) ⟩
               [⟨ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)),
                    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
                    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                     ⟩ ]tm ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm]))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
φ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)))
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))
        ∧ ∃h (φ
              [⟨ π₂
                   (tm_var
                      ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
               ⟩]))

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))
     ∧ ∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            ⟩])) [⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X

          exact x₁.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))))
     ∧ ∃h (φ
           [⟨ π₂
                (tm_var ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            ⟩])) [⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))))
    [⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩]
    ∧ ∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
           ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X), x₁ ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ φ [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))), x₁ ⟩]
  ∧ x₁ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)))
    ∧ ∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
           x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
           ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]
  ∧ x₁ ~ x₁
    ∧ ∃h (φ
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
           x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
           ⟩])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X

let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₁ ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)

  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₁
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
       x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
 exact y.

 exact x₂.

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ y ~ y
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y

  (Y

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

X, Y: partial_setoid H

          exact (partial_setoid_refl_r (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)),
       x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])

    x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (((Y ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ φ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
 exact y.

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
 exact x₂.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
