H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₁

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
Hφ: isMonic φ
ζ:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in ∃h (φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]): form X
ξ₁:= let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     monic_to_per_subobject ×h Y)
ξ₂:= let y := π₁ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in
let x := π₂ (tm_var (Y ×h X)) in φ [⟨ y, x ⟩]: form
  (Y
   ×h subobject_to_partial_setoid
        monic_to_per_subobject)
y:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((Y ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((Y ×h X) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ y, x₂ ⟩]

            apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.
  End Eso.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj
  per_subobject_disp_functor

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj
  per_subobject_disp_functor

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
∏
xx : disp_mono_codomain
       (category_of_partial_setoids H)
       (functor_identity
          (category_of_partial_setoids H) X),
∑ yy : disp_cat_per_subobject H X,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X)) (per_subobject_disp_functor X yy) xx

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
f: disp_mono_codomain (category_of_partial_setoids H)
  (functor_identity
     (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)
∑ yy : disp_cat_per_subobject H X,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X)) (per_subobject_disp_functor X yy) f

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X: partial_setoid H
Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ Y,
functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H) X
⟧
p: FullSubcategory.disp_full_sub
  (Total.total_category
     (Codomain.disp_codomain
        (category_of_partial_setoids H)))
  (λ f : Total.total_category
           (Codomain.disp_codomain
              (category_of_partial_setoids H)),
   isMonic (pr22 f))
  (functor_identity
     (category_of_partial_setoids H) X,, Y,, φ)
∑ yy : disp_cat_per_subobject H X,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X)) (per_subobject_disp_functor X yy)
  ((Y,, φ),, p)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
∑ yy : disp_cat_per_subobject H X,
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X)) (per_subobject_disp_functor X yy)
  ((Y,, φ),, p)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X))
  (per_subobject_disp_functor X
     (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) ((Y,, φ),, p)

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
per_subobject_disp_functor X
  (monic_to_per_subobject φ) -->[
identity_z_iso
  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)] 
((Y,, φ),, p)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
((Y,, φ),, p) -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X))] per_subobject_disp_functor X
               (monic_to_per_subobject φ)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
(?pr10 ;; ?pr1)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ((Y,, φ),, p) ((Y,, φ),, p))
  (pr2
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity
           (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
  (id_disp ((Y,, φ),, p))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
(λ _ : (?pr10 ;; ?pr1)%mor_disp =
       transportb
         (mor_disp ((Y,, φ),, p) ((Y,, φ),, p))
         (pr2
            (identity_z_iso
               (functor_identity
                  (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
         (id_disp ((Y,, φ),, p)),
 (?pr1 ;; ?pr10)%mor_disp =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (per_subobject_disp_functor X
         (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
      (per_subobject_disp_functor X
         (monic_to_per_subobject φ)))
   (pr1
      (identity_z_iso
         (functor_identity
            (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
   (id_disp
      (per_subobject_disp_functor X
         (monic_to_per_subobject φ)))) ?pr11

  (monic_to_per_subobject φ) -->[

  (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)] 
((Y,, φ),, p)

partial_setoid_comp_morphism ?Goal φ =

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p) φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
 apply monic_to_per_subobject_mor_eq.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
((Y,, φ),, p) -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (identity_z_iso
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X))] per_subobject_disp_functor X
               (monic_to_per_subobject φ)

φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_morphism Y
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ

  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) =

  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_morphism Y
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid
     (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
 apply monic_to_per_subobject_inv.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (monic_to_per_subobject_inv φ)
  (subobject_to_partial_setoid_incl
     (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
  (id_partial_setoid_morphism X)
 apply monic_to_per_subobject_inv_comm.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
((((monic_to_per_subobject_inv φ
    :
    category_of_partial_setoids H
    ⟦ pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p),
    pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
            (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) ⟧),,
   (monic_to_per_subobject_inv_comm φ
    :
    (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H
            ⟦ pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p),
            pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                    (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) ⟧,
     ff
     · pr21 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
               (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) =
     pr21 ((Y,, φ),, p)
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (identity_z_iso
            (functor_identity
               (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
      (monic_to_per_subobject_inv φ
       :
       category_of_partial_setoids H
       ⟦ pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p),
       pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
               (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) ⟧))),, tt) ;; 
 (((monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p
    :
    category_of_partial_setoids H
    ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
              (monic_to_per_subobject φ)),
    pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧),,
   (monic_to_per_subobject_mor_eq φ p
    :
    (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H
            ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                      (monic_to_per_subobject φ)),
            pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧,
     ff · pr21 ((Y,, φ),, p) =
     pr21 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
             (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
     · identity_z_iso
         (functor_identity
            (category_of_partial_setoids H) X))
      (monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p
       :
       category_of_partial_setoids H
       ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                 (monic_to_per_subobject φ)),
       pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧))),, tt))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp ((Y,, φ),, p) ((Y,, φ),, p))
  (pr2
     (identity_z_iso
        (functor_identity
           (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
  (id_disp ((Y,, φ),, p))
 apply locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism Y X
p: isMonic φ
(λ _ : ((((monic_to_per_subobject_inv φ
           :
           category_of_partial_setoids H
           ⟦ pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p),
           pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                   (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) ⟧),,
          (monic_to_per_subobject_inv_comm φ
           :
           (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H
                   ⟦ pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p),
                   pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                           (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
                   ⟧,
            ff
            · pr21 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                      (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) =
            pr21 ((Y,, φ),, p)
            · inv_from_z_iso
                (identity_z_iso
                   (functor_identity
                      (category_of_partial_setoids H)
                      X)))
             (monic_to_per_subobject_inv φ
              :
              category_of_partial_setoids H
              ⟦ pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p),
              pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                      (monic_to_per_subobject φ)) ⟧))),,
         tt) ;; (((monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p
                   :
                   category_of_partial_setoids H
                   ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor
                             X
                             (monic_to_per_subobject φ)),
                   pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧),,
                  (monic_to_per_subobject_mor_eq φ p
                   :
                   (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids
                             H
                           ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor
                                     X
                                     (monic_to_per_subobject
                                        φ)),
                           pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧,
                    ff · pr21 ((Y,, φ),, p) =
                    pr21 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                            (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
                    · identity_z_iso
                        (functor_identity
                           (category_of_partial_setoids
                              H) X))
                     (monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p
                      :
                      category_of_partial_setoids H
                      ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor
                                X
                                (monic_to_per_subobject
                                   φ)),
                      pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧))),, tt))%mor_disp =
       transportb
         (mor_disp ((Y,, φ),, p) ((Y,, φ),, p))
         (pr2
            (identity_z_iso
               (functor_identity
                  (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
         (id_disp ((Y,, φ),, p)),
 ((((monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p
     :
     category_of_partial_setoids H
     ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
               (monic_to_per_subobject φ)),
     pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧),,
    (monic_to_per_subobject_mor_eq φ p
     :
     (λ ff : category_of_partial_setoids H
             ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                       (monic_to_per_subobject φ)),
             pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧,
      ff · pr21 ((Y,, φ),, p) =
      pr21 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
              (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
      · identity_z_iso
          (functor_identity
             (category_of_partial_setoids H) X))
       (monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p
        :
        category_of_partial_setoids H
        ⟦ pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor X
                  (monic_to_per_subobject φ)),
        pr11 ((Y,, φ),, p) ⟧))),, tt) ;; (((monic_to_per_subobject_inv
                                              φ
                                            :
                                            category_of_partial_setoids
                                              H
                                            ⟦ pr11 
                                            ((Y,, φ),,
                                             p),
                                            pr11 (per_subobject_disp_functor
                                                 X
                                                 (monic_to_per_subobject
                                                 φ)) ⟧),,
                                           (monic_to_per_subobject_inv_comm
                                              φ
                                            :
                                            (λ ff : 
                                                category_of_partial_setoids
                                                 H
                                                ⟦ pr11 
                                                ((Y,,
                                                 φ),,
                                                 p),
                                                pr11 
                                                (per_subobject_disp_functor
                                                 X
                                                 (monic_to_per_subobject
                                                 φ)) ⟧,
                                             ff
                                             · pr21 
                                             (per_subobject_disp_functor
                                                X
                                                (monic_to_per_subobject
                                                 φ)) =
                                             pr21 
                                             ((Y,, φ),,
                                              p)
                                             · inv_from_z_iso
                                                 (identity_z_iso
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (category_of_partial_setoids
                                                 H) X)))
                                              (monic_to_per_subobject_inv
                                                 φ
                                               :
                                               category_of_partial_setoids
                                                 H
                                               ⟦ pr11 
                                               ((Y,, φ),,
                                                p),
                                               pr11 
                                               (per_subobject_disp_functor
                                                 X
                                                 (monic_to_per_subobject
                                                 φ)) ⟧))),,
                                          tt))%mor_disp =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (per_subobject_disp_functor X
         (monic_to_per_subobject φ))
      (per_subobject_disp_functor X
         (monic_to_per_subobject φ)))
   (pr1
      (identity_z_iso
         (functor_identity
            (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
   (id_disp
      (per_subobject_disp_functor X
         (monic_to_per_subobject φ))))
  (let X0 :=
     λ (C : category) (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
     (xx : disp_mono_codomain C x)
     (yy : disp_mono_codomain C y)
     (x0 x' : xx -->[ f] yy),
     pr1
       (locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat C x y
          f xx yy x0 x') in
   X0 (category_of_partial_setoids H)
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X)
     (functor_identity (category_of_partial_setoids H)
        X)
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso
           (functor_identity
              (category_of_partial_setoids H) X))
      · identity_z_iso
          (functor_identity
             (category_of_partial_setoids H) X))
     ((Y,, φ),, p) ((Y,, φ),, p)
     (((monic_to_per_subobject_inv φ,,
        monic_to_per_subobject_inv_comm φ),, tt) ;; 
      ((monic_to_per_subobject_mor φ p,,
        monic_to_per_subobject_mor_eq φ p),, tt))%mor_disp
     (transportb
        (mor_disp ((Y,, φ),, p) ((Y,, φ),, p))
        (pr2
           (identity_z_iso
              (functor_identity
                 (category_of_partial_setoids H) X)))
        (id_disp ((Y,, φ),, p))))
 apply locally_propositional_mono_cod_disp_cat.
  Defined.
End MonoSubobjectEquiv.
